interpretive_note: Primary Source Evidence: "...Those who are replications of Christ are replications of the Urgrund, and the Urgrund is beyond the world, although from the first Advent on it has invisibly penetrated the world. Claudia Hambro says in CONFESSIONS when she says she can feel the crown of thorns. "Christ didn't die for us; he was an example which each of us must follow, and suffer as he did to attain what he attained," as she put it to Jack Isidore (paraphrase). No man can die --atone-- for your sins. You must atone yourself, following him as model; he is the guide, the mediator, not a sacrifice.
